## IP Statements and License

# Intellectual Property Statements

**This Implementation Guide was generated by artificial intelligence (Claude, by Anthropic) for public research and educational purposes only.** It is not an official HL7 product and has not been through HL7's IP review or approval processes.

## AI Generation Disclosure

This Implementation Guide, including all FSH profile definitions, extension definitions, value set bindings, code system entries, narrative documentation, mapping tables, and examples, was **generated by Claude (an AI system by Anthropic)** under iterative human direction and review.

* **AI system:** Claude (claude-sonnet-4-6), Anthropic
* **Generation period:** 2026
* **Human oversight:** All outputs reviewed by a human; SUSHI compilation verified
* **Validation status:** SUSHI 3.18.x — 0 errors, 0 warnings. IG Publisher validation not performed.

This disclosure is provided in the interest of transparency regarding AI-generated healthcare standards content.

### NEMSIS

"NEMSIS" and the NEMSIS data standard are the property of the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) and managed by the NEMSIS Technical Assistance Center (TAC) at the University of Utah. The NEMSIS code values, element names, and schema structures reproduced in this IG are used for research and educational purposes. This IG is not affiliated with or endorsed by NEMSIS TAC, NHTSA, or NASEMSO.

### LOINC

This material contains content from LOINC (http://loinc.org). LOINC is copyright © 1995–2024, Regenstrief Institute, Inc. and the Logical Observation Identifiers Names and Codes (LOINC) Committee. It is available at no cost under the license at https://loinc.org/license/. LOINC® is a registered United States trademark of Regenstrief Institute, Inc.

### SNOMED CT

This material includes SNOMED Clinical Terms® (SNOMED CT®) which is used by permission of the International Health Terminology Standards Development Organisation (IHTSDO). All rights reserved. SNOMED CT® was originally created by the College of American Pathologists. "SNOMED" and "SNOMED CT" are registered trademarks of the IHTSDO. Use of SNOMED CT in the United States is free via the NLM UMLS Metathesaurus.

### CPT Notice

CPT copyright 2024 American Medical Association. All rights reserved. CPT is a registered trademark of the American Medical Association. This IG includes references to CPT codes for educational purposes only. Implementers must obtain an appropriate AMA CPT license for commercial use.
